creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: miwi
Date: Fri Jan 11 12:41:07 UTC 2019
New revision: 489955
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/489955

Log:
  Todoman is a simple, standards-based, cli todo (aka: task) manager.
  Todos are stored into icalendar files, which means you can sync them
  via CalDAV using, for example, vdirsyncer.

  WWW: https://github.com/pimutils/todoman/

  PR:		227867
  Submitted by:	andreas@bilke.org
  Sponsored by:	iXsystems Inc.

Changes:
  head/deskutils/Makefile
  head/deskutils/py-todoman/
  head/deskutils/py-todoman/Makefile
  head/deskutils/py-todoman/distinfo
  head/deskutils/py-todoman/pkg-descr
